title: Bare Root Orange Shrub Rose 'Sunshine' – Vibrant Hardy Rose for Brightening Borders, Walkways & Garden Landscaping
features: Shipped as Bare Root: The rose is carefully wrapped with its original soil to protect the roots during shipping. Upon arrival, it will be 35-45cm tall and will grow to a mature height of 90-120cm, depending on care and growing conditions.
Orange Sunshine brings a burst of energy to the garden with its vibrant orange blooms, radiating warmth and positivity.
Mature growth and well-established roots ensure a vigorous and healthy plant, promising an abundant display.
Adds a cheerful and uplifting ambiance to garden borders, pathways, and containers, brightening up any outdoor space.
Planting Time: Jan - May, Sept - Nov
